summary: Phase 10 Intelligence Engine Testing Complete - Dashboard Command Center, Intel Terminal, Portfolio. Backend: 9/9 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements and flows verified working.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement suggestion, non-blocking

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/intelligence/market-pulse returns 10 indicators (S&P 500, NASDAQ, IBOVESPA, BTC/USD, ETH/USD, USD/BRL, GOLD, OIL, EUR/USD, DXY)
Backend: Each indicator has symbol, value, change fields with numeric values
Backend: GET /api/intelligence/geopolitical-risk returns 8 regions with risk_score, risk_level, events
Backend: Risk scores between 0-100 with valid levels (critical, high, elevated, moderate, low)
Backend: Global risk score calculated as average of all regions
Backend: GET /api/intelligence/events-feed returns categorized events with severity levels
Backend: Events have id, category, severity, title, timestamp, impact fields
Backend: Categories include geopolitics, macro, crypto, commodity, terrorism, climate, politics, crime
Backend: GET /api/intelligence/performance-highlights returns top performing assets with asset, sector, performance
Backend: GET /api/intelligence/daily-briefing returns AI-generated briefing using GPT-5.2
Backend: Briefing has sentiment classification (OPTIMISTIC, HIGH ALERT, SLIGHTLY CAUTIOUS, NEUTRAL)
Backend: POST /api/intelligence/scenario-analysis accepts question and returns AI analysis
Backend: Scenario analysis returns structured response with question, analysis, model fields
Backend: Portfolio API returns positions, total_value, total_pnl
Backend: Portfolio add position works correctly
Frontend: Dashboard Command Center loads with greeting and date
Frontend: My Portfolio section shows value in USD ($100.0K)
Frontend: Market Pulse displays all 10 indicators with values and percentage changes
Frontend: Daily Intelligence button triggers AI briefing generation
Frontend: AI briefing displays structured sections (Headline, Key Developments, Market Impact, Opportunities & Risks)
Frontend: JARVIS Global Sentiment banner shows dynamic sentiment (HIGH ALERT when risk elevated)
Frontend: OSINT Geopolitical Risk Monitor shows 8 regions with color-coded risk scores
Frontend: Live Events Feed shows categorized events with severity badges
Frontend: Performance Highlights table shows top performers (GOOG +197.2%, BTC +164.3%, etc.)
Frontend: Intel Terminal page loads with SVG world map
Frontend: Global Risk Map visualizes regions with animated hotspots
Frontend: Risk Detail panel shows region info when clicked (name, score, events, impacted assets)
Frontend: Intelligence Feed has working category filter buttons (ALL, GEOPOLITICS, MACRO, CRYPTO, etc.)
Frontend: Scenario Analysis input accepts questions and returns AI analysis
Frontend: Scenario analysis shows detailed structured response with probabilities and recommendations
Frontend: Portfolio page shows health score ring (0-100)
Frontend: Portfolio shows total value, P&L, and percentage change
Frontend: Quick Stats shows Positions count, Best Performer, Risk Score, Win Rate
Frontend: Positions table ready for user entries
Frontend: Allocation pie chart section present
Frontend: Add Position dialog opens with Symbol (USD Ticker), Type, Quantity, Avg Price (USD) fields
Frontend: Market Performance Highlights shows top 10 performers
Frontend: Navigation sidebar has updated labels (Command Center, Intel Terminal, AI Quantica Lab)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: Intelligence endpoints correctly return structured data for all 6 endpoints
Backend: Daily briefing uses GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM key with proper system prompts
Backend: Scenario analysis provides institutional-grade responses with probability estimates
Backend: Geopolitical risk data includes 8 global regions with dynamic risk score variations
Backend: Market pulse includes proper mix of indices, crypto, forex, commodities (10 indicators)
Frontend: Dashboard Command Center is well-designed with clear hierarchy and data visualization
Frontend: SVG world map properly renders with color-coded risk hotspots and animations
Frontend: Category filters in Intelligence Feed work correctly with state management
Frontend: Health score ring uses SVG arc animation with color coding based on score
Frontend: All monetary values displayed in USD as required
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user - no new seed data created
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 10 Intelligence Engine fully tested. Six new endpoints at /api/intelligence/: market-pulse (10 indicators), geopolitical-risk (8 regions), events-feed (10 events with categories), performance-highlights (top performers), daily-briefing (GPT-5.2 AI), scenario-analysis (POST with question). Frontend pages: /dashboard (Command Center), /intelligence (Intel Terminal with SVG map), /portfolio (Health score ring). All values in USD. Navigation labels updated: Command Center, Intel Terminal, AI Quantica Lab. Daily briefing and scenario analysis use real GPT-5.2 (not mocked). Data-testids: load-briefing-btn, daily-briefing-text, sentiment-banner, filter-{category}, scenario-input, scenario-submit-btn, scenario-result, risk-btn-{region_id}, portfolio-page, portfolio-total-value, health-score-ring, positions-table, add-position-btn, add-symbol-input, add-quantity-input, add-price-input.

mocked_components.note: Intelligence endpoints use pre-defined data with slight randomization, NOT mocked APIs
real_apis: Daily Briefing: GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM key (real AI generation)
Scenario Analysis: GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM key (real AI analysis)
Market Pulse: Pre-defined indicators with random variation
Geopolitical Risk: Pre-defined regions with risk score randomization

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No issues found. All Phase 10 Intelligence Engine features working correctly.
